text: What would you name a new planet?
Invent a new holiday and describe how it's celebrated.
If you could have any superpower for one day, what would it be?
Write a haiku about your favorite food.
What would you put in a time capsule for aliens to find?
Invent a new color and describe what it looks like.
What's the worst advice you've ever heard?
If animals could talk, which would be the most interesting?
Design a new emoji and explain what it means.
What would you do with a million dollars?
Describe a school subject that doesn't exist yet.
What would the last invention on Earth be?
Invent a sport that combines two existing sports.
What's a rule every house should have?
Describe your dream treehouse.
What would you name your autobiography?
Invent a gadget that solves a tiny everyday annoyance.
What sound does silence make?
Describe a city built entirely underwater.
If your pet could send you one text message, what would it say?
Invent a new musical instrument (describe its sound).
What would you teach a robot first?
Describe the most useless superpower imaginable.
What's the secret ingredient in your imaginary restaurant's signature dish?
Invent a excuse for being late that nobody has used before.
What would a museum exhibit about today look like in 200 years?
Describe a vehicle that travels through clouds.
What's the best name for a cloud shaped like a hat?
Invent a game played only in zero gravity.
What would you say in a speech to your future self?
Describe a library where the books talk back.
What's a chore that could be turned into a fun competition?
Invent a new flavor of ice cream nobody has tried.
What would you build if gravity worked sideways for a day?
Describe the world's most unnecessary invention.
What's a question you wish more people asked you?
Invent a new type of weather.
Describe your ideal treehouse-turned-spaceship.
What would you name a village hidden inside a mountain?
Invent a shop that only sells one strange item.
What's the funniest thing a talking toaster could say?
Describe a park designed entirely for grown-ups to play in.
What would you name a newly discovered dinosaur?
Invent a tradition your family will keep for 100 years.
Describe the last text message a time traveler would send.
What's a smell that should be turned into a perfume but isn't?
Invent a new Olympic event.
What would a diary entry from a house look like?
Describe a bridge that connects two very different worlds.
What's the best thing to yell when you win at anything?
